meta.title: Fyzio Plus · private physiotherapy in Prague
meta.description: Private physiotherapy clinic in Prague 2. Back, joint, post-surgery rehab. 60-min sessions, no waiting list.

announcement.text: May availability: last 4 Tuesday slots. Book online

hero.headline: Recover at your own pace.
hero.sub: Sixty-minute sessions, a clear plan and a return to pain-free movement. No waiting lists and no doctor's referral required.

symptoms.label: Where does it hurt?
symptoms.title: Pick your problem.
symptoms.lead: Tap the area that's bothering you — we'll show you how the therapy works and exactly what to expect.
symptoms.s1_desc: Lumbago, sciatica, L4–L5 blockages. Quick relief with manual therapy plus a home exercise plan.
symptoms.s2_desc: Cervical spine, tension headache, dizziness from muscle tightness. Traction plus dry needling.
symptoms.s3_desc: Frozen shoulder, runner's knee, rotator cuff. Manual mobilisation plus kinesio tape.
symptoms.s4_desc: ACL, Achilles, fractures. A graded return-to-movement plan — one step at a time.
symptoms.s5_desc: Running, football, tennis, skiing. Overuse diagnostics plus a return-to-sport plan.
symptoms.s6_desc: Pelvic pain, diastasis recti, regaining strength after birth. Soft techniques, gentle on the abdominal wall.

journey.label: How it works
journey.title: Four steps to recovery.
journey.lead: No mysteries, no upselling unnecessary sessions. From the first meeting to walking on your own.
journey.step1_desc: Medical history, movement screen, source of pain. 60 unhurried minutes.
journey.step2_desc: Together we agree on a realistic plan and an honest estimate of how many sessions you'll need. We never push you into bigger packages.
journey.step3_desc: Manual therapy, dry needling, taping, exercise. After every session you get a home plan.
journey.step4_desc: Independence. You know how to prevent the pain coming back, when to return to sport, how to train.

team.label: About
team.title: The person you'll meet
team.name: Mgr. Marta Hudáková
team.bio1: M.Sc. physiotherapy, Charles University (2012). Six years on the rehab ward at FN Motol, own clinic since 2020. Specialises in spine and sports injuries.
team.bio2: Outside work: a runner, a skier, mother of two. „I've had my own back trouble — we look after patients the way I'd want to be looked after.“

credentials.label: Education & certificates
credentials.title: Clinical training, not a weekend course.
credentials.lead: Certified methods, postgraduate courses, continuous education. What we do with your body has solid theoretical ground beneath it.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent prices.
pricing.lead: We're a private clinic and don't bill the public insurers. That's exactly why we can give you a full 60 minutes every time and do proper, careful work.
pricing.note: We accept Multisport, Benefit Plus and Edenred.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Before your first session.
faq.q1: Do I need a referral from a doctor?
faq.a1: No. As a private clinic we don't need a referral or recommendation. You can come directly to us — we do our own diagnostics.
faq.a2: Comfortable sportswear (leggings / shorts plus a t-shirt). If you have older imaging (X-ray, MRI), bring it — but it's not required.
faq.q3: How long until I feel relief?
faq.a3: Acute issues (lumbago, neck pain) often respond after 2–3 sessions. For chronic issues expect 5–8 sessions plus regular home work.
faq.a4: Yes, through our online booking system (24/7) or by phone. You'll get a reminder 24 hours before your appointment.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Book your session
contact.lead: Online booking works 24/7. By phone we're available during clinic hours.

cookies.text: We use cookies for a better experience.

cond.meta_title: Conditions we treat · Fyzio Plus · Praha
cond.meta_desc: We treat back pain, knee, post-surgical recovery, sport injuries and pregnancy. No referral needed.
cond.title: We know what to do — even when you don't yet know what's wrong.
cond.lead: The most common reasons people come to us. Click on yours and we'll walk you through how the therapy goes, how many sessions it usually takes and what helps at home.
cond.c1_p: The most common reason people come to us. Often a combination of weak core, lifting wrong, and 8 hours at a desk.
cond.c2_p: Pain after walking, stairs, getting up from a chair. Acute and chronic alike.
cond.c3_p: Pain behind the eyes, stiff neck, dizziness. Often from desk work and stress.
cond.c4_p: Structured rehab after total knee replacement or ligament reconstruction. We work with your orthopaedic surgeon.
cond.c5_p: After rotator cuff, decompression or labral repair surgery. Return to daily life and sport.
cond.c6_p: Achilles, ITB syndrome, runner's knee, plantar fasciitis. Including running technique analysis.
cond.c7_p: Repetitive-strain injuries — chronic pain at the bench, deadlift, on the tennis court or climbing.
cond.c8_p: Pain radiating from the spine into limbs, tingling, paresthesia. With or without an MRI.
cond.c9_p: Pelvic and lower-back pain, abdominal diastasis. Gentle therapy in agreement with your OB-GYN.

ins.title: We work with insurers
ins.lead: Contracted with VZP, ZP MV, ČPZP and Military Health Insurance. With a referral your first session is covered; without one, 1 200 Kč / 60 min.

book.meta_desc: Book your appointment online — pick a condition, therapist and time. Available within 5 days.
book.title: Four steps to your appointment.
book.lead: No waiting lists and no doctor's referral needed. Booking online takes a minute — your appointment is within five days.
book.s1_p: Pick the area that best matches your problem. If unsure, choose "not sure" — we'll evaluate it together at your first visit.
book.s2_p: All three are state-certified physiotherapists. If you have no preference, "any free" gets you the soonest appointment.
book.s3_p: Sessions are 60 minutes. The next available times in the coming five days:
book.s4_p: We confirm by email and SMS within an hour. No commitment — you can reschedule or cancel up to 24 hours before.
book.f_msg_ph: When did it start, what makes it worse, what do you think it is...
